implementation: colors: { apple: { text: '#1d1d1f' 'text-secondary': '#86868b' bg: '#fbfbfd' blue: '#2997ff' } } in tailwind.config
anti_pattern: Using Tailwind's default gray palette for Apple UI
notes: Named semantic colors matching Apple's exact palette

anti_pattern: Random arbitrary spacing values in every class
notes: Consistent spacing scale matching Apple's 8pt grid
SF Pro on Apple hardware; Inter elsewhere
Requires backdrop-filter support; matches Apple's frosted glass

implementation: class="rounded-2xl overflow-hidden" (16px) or rounded-3xl (24px) on cards
notes: Continuous corner approximation with Tailwind's largest presets

implementation: class="min-h-[44px] min-w-[44px] flex items-center justify-center" on buttons
anti_pattern: class="p-1" icon-only buttons without size guarantee
notes: Meets Apple HIG 44pt minimum interactive target

column8: Apple's default easing curve via arbitrary ease value

anti_pattern: Separate dark mode stylesheets or JS toggling
notes: Tailwind's built-in dark: variant tied to prefers-color-scheme

anti_pattern: class="w-full" without max-width on text content
notes: Apple constrains readable content width; arbitrary value needed
Apple's generous vertical rhythm between content blocks
Exact iOS body text size match for web Apple content

implementation: class="tracking-tight" (-0.025em) or tracking-[-0.04em] on large display text
notes: Tight tracking is the signature Apple display text treatment
Apple's warm off-white and near-black avoid pure contrast extremes

implementation: class="shadow-sm" for cards; class="shadow-lg" for elevated modals
notes: Tailwind's shadow scale maps well to Apple elevation system

implementation: class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-6" for feature grids
notes: CSS Grid with gap matches Apple's feature grid layouts
Respects iOS Reduce Motion accessibility preference
Apple's oversized bold hero requires arbitrary sizes above Tailwind's defaults

implementation: class="fixed top-0 inset-x-0 z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 border-b border-black/5"
anti_pattern: class="fixed top-0 bg-white" fully opaque nav
notes: Complete Apple nav pattern with blur and subtle border

anti_pattern: class="btn bg-blue-600 text-white px-6 py-3 rounded" button CTA
notes: Apple uses styled text links not button CTAs for primary actions
Apple's secondary is warmer/lighter than Tailwind gray-500
Only transform and opacity composited on GPU; avoids layout thrash

anti_pattern: class="max-w-full h-auto" for hero product images
notes: Full-bleed product images match Apple's marketing presentation
Consistent horizontal margins across breakpoints

implementation: class="aspect-video" or class="aspect-square" on image containers
notes: Native CSS aspect-ratio via Tailwind; avoids reflow
Keyboard-accessible focus indicator using Apple's blue
